headline: Why Fair Isaac (FICO) Is Up 11.1% After New FICO Score 10T Mortgage Data Release
summary: On 1 July 2026, FICO announced that Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac had released expanded FICO Score 10T historical mortgage datasets, covering loan-level performance from April 2013 through September 2025 and available directly from the GSEs. This release, together with free lender access to FICO Score 10T alongside Classic FICO, gives the mortgage market a much deeper, real-world basis for assessing modernized, trended-data credit scoring that incorporates rental payment history when...

headline: Brown Advisory Large-Cap Growth Strategy Sold Its Stake in Fair Isaac Corporation (FICO)
summary: Brown Advisory, an investment management company, released its “Brown Large-Cap Growth Strategy” for the first-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The Brown Advisory Large-Cap Growth Strategy experienced a decline in the first quarter of 2026, modestly trailing the Russell 1000 Growth Index.
